description_long: This is a modern, rectangular wooden cabinet with a light oak finish, featuring a combination of open shelving and a large drawer. The left side of the front face has a wide, white drawer with a metallic handle, while the right side consists of two open horizontal shelves. The top surface is flat and spacious, suitable for placing decorative items or electronics. The sides and back are plain, with the wood grain pattern visible throughout. The overall design is minimalist and functional, making it suitable for urban living rooms, offices, or waiting areas.
description: A light oak-finished cabinet with a large white drawer and two open shelves, featuring a minimalist and modern design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the white drawer with a metallic handle on the left and two open shelves on the right.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the plain, light oak wood panel with no visible features.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a continuous wood panel with no openings or handles, and the open shelves on the left.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, identical to the other side, with a plain wood panel.
